assertionResults.title: Full Create → Shared happy path
reproductionSteps: Navigate to http://127.0.0.1:5173/demo/create-keyset and click 'Create Keyset'.
Verify route progression to /create/progress and auto-advance to /create/profile.
At /create/profile, confirm no 'invalid input: Invalid group package' message, fill Password + Confirm Password, then continue.
On /create/distribute, perform package handoff actions (Copy/QR for remote packages) and continue to /create/complete.
On /create/complete, click 'Finish Distribution' and verify navigation to /dashboard/{profileId}.
observations: No blocking 'invalid input: Invalid group package' error appeared on /create/profile.
Console log and page error captures are empty (no errors recorded during flow).

frictions.description: 'Finish Distribution' was initially disabled at /create/complete until remote package handoff actions were performed on /create/distribute.
frictions.resolution: Returned to /create/distribute, completed Copy/QR actions for remote packages, then proceeded to /create/complete where 'Finish Distribution' became enabled.

summary: VAL-CRT-012 passed on rerun: full create happy path progressed through /create/progress, /create/profile, /create/distribute, /create/complete, and finished at /dashboard/{profileId} with no console/page errors and no invalid group package blocker at /create/profile.
